summary: Iter 19 — 'Auto find location of employee' feature completeness. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests PASS for POST /api/auth/employee-signup optional `address` field (persist, backward compat, empty→null, whitespace→null, invalid company code 404, duplicate phone 409), plus regressions for GET /api/companies/lookup/{code} and POST /api/auth/company-register. Frontend E2E: geolocation-granted Playwright session opened /employee-signup, filled Step 1 with seeded company code ITER19QA, advanced to Step 2, tapped 'Use my current location' → Nominatim returned 'Pandara Park, Chanakya Puri Tehsil, New Delhi, Delhi, 110503, India' in <1s, auto-populated signup-address input; submit created the account and reached the 'Account created!' done screen. Static inspection of app/(tabs)/attendance.tsx confirms (i) MiniMap rendered with office+me pins, (ii) reverseGeocode invoked after every location refresh + once for office_lat/lng, (iii) setInterval(refreshLocation, 30000) auto-refresh in place, (iv) both address and officeAddress states rendered in JSX. MiniMap.tsx uses react-native-webview (in package.json) and builds a valid Leaflet HTML with circleMarker + polyline + fitBounds. location.ts reverseGeocode/requestLocation/formatDistance are correct (formatDistance(150)='150 m', formatDistance(1500)='1.5 km'). Super admin PIN NOT touched. All TEST_/ITER19 seed data cleaned up.

minor.issue: PRE-EXISTING (not introduced in iter_19): `users.email` unique index is not sparse/partial. Any second employee who signs up without providing an email fails with 500 (E11000 duplicate key on email:null). Flagged in iter_10/11/12/17/18 already. Fix: mongo shell `db.users.dropIndex('email_1'); db.users.createIndex({email:1},{unique:true, partialFilterExpression:{email:{$type:'string'}}});` and/or omit the field from the insert when null.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — non-blocking but should migrate in `/app/frontend/src/theme.ts` (shadow.cta and any StyleSheet using shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius on web).

action_items: (Optional / cosmetic) Migrate `shadow*` style props to `boxShadow` for RN web parity — no functional impact.

(Pre-existing, orthogonal to this iter) Recreate `users.email` index as partial/sparse so multiple null-email employees can co-exist. This currently only manifests if two employees sign up without email in the same DB.
critical_code_review_comments: location.ts.reverseGeocode: correct Nominatim URL, UA + Accept-Language headers, graceful null-return on !ok / throw — good.

location.ts.requestLocation: correctly handles Location.getForegroundPermissionsAsync + requestForegroundPermissionsAsync, offers Settings deep-link on !canAskAgain (non-web), returns null on deny — good.
location.ts.formatDistance: matches spec ('150 m', '1.5 km'). Handles null/NaN → '—'.
MiniMap.tsx: builds valid Leaflet HTML with circleMarker + polyline + fitBounds when both pins present; escapes label JS characters; falls back to setView on center when only one pin — good.
attendance.tsx: 30s setInterval cleanup via clearInterval in useEffect return — no leaks. Reverse-geocode is fire-and-forget with null-safe setter — good.
employee-signup.tsx: address input has testID `signup-address`, button has testID `signup-use-my-location`, fallback 'lat, lng' string used when reverseGeocode returns null — spec compliant.
server.py employee_signup: address normalisation `(payload.address or '').strip() or None` correctly maps '', '   ', omitted → None; stores plain string otherwise — spec compliant.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (E2E: geolocation grant → reverse-geocode → address populated → submit → done screen)

seed_data_creation: Seeded company `TEST_Iter19_Co` (code TEST######) & `Iter19 UI Test Co` (code ITER19QA) + up to 5 TEST_ employee users during runs. All cleaned up at end via pymongo teardown and mongosh — verified 0 remaining after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file `test_employee_signup_iter19.py` is idempotent (unique phone via uuid-derived digits, module-scoped autouse cleanup fixture). If reused, note that it inserts a temp company via pymongo — no admin auth needed. Super admin PIN was NOT touched; do not touch it. Nominatim did respond fast (<1s) for Delhi coords; if it starts rate-limiting the frontend still degrades gracefully to 'lat, lng' fallback which is already covered in employee-signup.tsx line 297.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional defects found. All 4 sub-features (A reverse-geocode, B 30s auto-refresh, C Use-my-location on signup, D MiniMap with two pins) are implemented and verified working end-to-end.
